ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who created the order */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count of the product */,
  "manufacture_year" INTEGER /* Year the product was manufactured */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the product (e.g., mint, good, fair) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the product */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical category structure) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for warehouse contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for warehouse contact */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to (e.g., sales, logistics, finance) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse from which the order is shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., truck, air) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order from which the product is returned */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order for which the payment is made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the payment */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment transaction (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product to which the promotion applies */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount offered during the promotion */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to apply the promotion */,
  "maximum_spend" REAL /* Maximum spend up to which the promotion applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
